subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath desired his Lord, that He may make him a bird soaring in this atmosphere and cause him to hear that which calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اراد مولاه لیجعله طائرا فی هذا الهوآء و یسمعه ما ینادی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
